name: Skyline Furniture 30" Parsons Barstool Bandana Blue Floral: Hardwood, Padded, Kitchen Counter Height
description:
Perfect for adding to a kitchen counter or bar, this Parsons Print Barstool adds a bold touch to your decor. This elegant patterned stool features a hardwood construction for long-lasting use, while padding on the seat and back ensures you remain comfortable while seated. The stool features a printed upholstered design for a look you're sure to love. With four sturdy square legs for stability, this wood barstool will make a great addition to any table or counter.

Overall Width: 19 Inches
Overall Height: 45 Inches
Overall Depth: 24 Inches
